LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO DEFENDANT IQBAL SHAH'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTION OF CASE NUMBER CGC-16-553391 WITH CASE NUMBER CGC-17-558908 PURSUNT TO CCP SECTION 1048(A), THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND GRANTS THE MOTION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. THE COURT DESIGNATES THE CASES CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES AND CASE CGC-17-558908 IS DESIGNATED THE LEAD CASE. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: SUZANNE R. BOLANOS, CLERK: M. MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-553391 WITH CASE CGC-17-558908
Off Calendar Aug-22-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Bryana McGuire, Esq. (415-474-1900) of Kern, Noda, Devine & Segal for Plaintiff Desoto Cab Company on case CGC-16-553391.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT IQBAL SHAH'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTION OF CASE NUMBER CGC-16-553391 WITH CASE NUMBER CGC-17-558908 PURSUNT TO CCP SECTION 1048(A)is Granted pursuant to stipulation. The court designates the cases consolidated for all purposes and case CGC-17-558908 is designated the lead case. Order is signed. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Gordon Aiavao, CSR #11216, gaiavao@sftc.org, Reported. =(302/SRB)
